questionHtml:
After a second bounce, the bottle rotates about its centre of mass. The bottle rotates at 0.35 revolutions per second.

The centre of mass of the bottle is halfway between the base and the top of the bottle. Assume that the velocity of the centre of mass is zero.

Calculate the linear speed of the top of the bottle.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1

ω = 2π(0.35) «=2.20 rad s−1» ✓
Use of v = 0.14ω ✓
0.31 «m s−1» ✓

 

ALTERNATIVE 2

T = 10.35 «= 2.9 s» ✓

V = 2π(0.14)T  OR  v20.14 = 4π2(0.14)T2 ✓

v = 0.31 «m s−1» ✓

 

Award [3] for BCA

meta.title: After a second bounce, the bottle rotates about its centre of mass. The bottle rotates at 0.35 revolutions per second. The centre of mass of the bottle is halfway between the base
